summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CV web application. All major features working correctly including multilingual support, geo-restriction, responsive design, and interactive elements. Found one responsive design issue with navigation on tablet view.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation buttons hidden/not clickable on tablet view (768px width)
ui_bugs.details: Navigation elements are present but not visible/clickable on tablet viewport, likely CSS media query issue

passed_tests: Multilingual switch (FR/DE/IT/EN) - All 4 languages working perfectly
Language persistence - Maintains selected language after page reload
Geo-restriction functionality - Correctly blocks non-Swiss access
Hero section responsive design - Works on desktop, mobile, and tablet
Back to top button - Appears after scroll and functions correctly
Smooth scroll navigation - Working on desktop
All sections present - About, Experience, Skills, Education, References
Scroll animations with Framer Motion working
Mobile responsiveness (390px) - All elements properly displayed
Desktop functionality (1920px) - Full feature set working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation visibility issue on tablet view (768px width). Navigation buttons are present but hidden/not clickable, likely due to CSS media query configuration.
